title: Odontites ruber
taxonomy: Odontites ruber is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This family is commonly known as the broomrape family. It is a type of hemiparasitic plant, meaning it obtains some of its nutrients by parasitizing other plants, but also produces its own food through photosynthesis. Odontites ruber is native to Europe and North Africa, and is often found in dry, sandy areas. The classification of Odontites ruber is further broken down into the binomial nomenclature of Odontites ruber (L.) L'Her.
